title: ORGANVM: One-Person Enterprise Architecture
subtitle: How AI-conducted automation enables a single director to operate 149 repositories across 8 functional organs

technical_highlights.detail: 121 entities with permanent ULID-based UIDs, temporal naming, event bus
4 concrete sensors (Registry, Soak, CI, Promotion) producing 115+ signals
Tension detection (123 tensions), blast radius propagation, entity clustering
6 evolution policies with automated evaluation and revision workflow
Daily entity snapshots with drift detection across 106 entities
4,015+ tests across 6 packages, autouse fixture blocks production paths
9 JSON Schemas validating all system data contracts
94 MCP tools exposing full system graph to AI assistants

architecture_principles: Unidirectional dependency flow: I→II→III, IV orchestrates, V observes
AI-conductor model: human directs, AI generates, human reviews
Protocol-based sensing: ontologia defines interfaces, engine implements concrete sensors
Graceful degradation: all bridge modules work with or without ontologia installed

validation_evidence.governance_audit: Automated policy evaluation across all entities
